column6: 189 files contain "tieba" or "贴吧". CLAUDE.md states Tieba scraper was "fully removed (49 files)" but substantial documentation, data, and code references persist. README.md alone has ~120 lines (EN + CN) promoting Tieba as if it still works.

column3: README.md is the largest remaining Tieba artifact — ~120 lines across English + Chinese sections that present Tieba as an active feature, including nav links, subsections, commands, and a task table row.
column6: README.md:18 (nav link), :94-158 (EN Tieba section — 65 lines), :526-590 (CN 贴吧 section — 65 lines), :932 (task table row). All present Tieba scraping as operational when the code was removed. README.md:143 claims "The project has integrated Tieba keyword scraping" — false.

column3: .claude/tieba_scrape/ (96KB, 20 files) and server/data/tiebaKeywordCorpus.*/ (32KB) are orphaned data from the removed scraper — no code reads them anymore.
column6: .claude/tieba_scrape/ — 20 JSON files; server/data/tiebaKeywordCorpus.comments/ — 1 shard; server/data/tiebaKeywordCorpus.runs/ — 1 run file. No JS/Python code imports or reads these paths since the scraper was deleted.

column3: Live code still references Tieba URLs and paths even though the scraper is gone: commentCoverage.js checks tieba URLs in error patterns, paths.js exports DEFAULT_TIEBA_CORPUS_PATH, stop-hub.cjs checks tieba-keyword-scrape task type.
column6: server/services/commentCoverage.js:40-41 (Tieba URL HTTP error patterns), server/utils/paths.js:12 (DEFAULT_TIEBA_CORPUS_PATH), .claude/hooks/stop-hub.cjs:88 (tieba-keyword-scrape type), .claude/hooks/compact-checkpoint.cjs:92 (tiebaKeywordCorpus.json path)

column3: set-deepseek-env.example.ps1 still has a BAIDU_COOKIE section instructing users to log into tieba.baidu.com and provides cookie instructions for Tieba scraping.
column6: set-deepseek-env.example.ps1:24-49 — BAIDU_COOKIE section with "Log into tieba.baidu.com" instruction and "Tieba thread scraping may hit CAPTCHA" warning.

column3: MASTER_PLAN.md and MIGRATION_PLAN.md still contain Tieba sections as if Tieba is a future/planned component rather than removed.
column6: .claude/MASTER_PLAN.md:145-156 (Section 3b. Tieba Cross-Platform Scrape), MIGRATION_PLAN.md:58,90,102,119,128 (Tieba migration entries)

column3: Python migration_inventory.py (1800+ lines) contains ~100 Tieba references as historical migration markers — these are correct and should stay since they document what was removed.
column6: python_backend/analysis/migration_inventory.py — Tieba references are in migration gates, comparison scripts, and validation entries. These are archival records of the removal, not live instructions. 68 tests already @unittest.skip("Tieba scraper removed").
